payload.last_assistant_message:
There's nothing to commit. Here's what I found:

- **`.claude`** — symlink to `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/.claude` (agentic layer, not app code)
- **`adws`** — agentic workflow scripts (agentic layer)
- **`.ports.env`** — runtime config (ephemeral)
- **`.logs/`** — logs (ephemeral)

The spec file (`specs/issue-16abcd2e-...`) is gitignored by the `/specs/` rule.

No feature code has been implemented yet on this branch — `main` and `feat-21-add-savings-amount-display-discount` are at the same commit (`4905d77`). The discount template changes need to be written first before there's anything to commit.
